decision_basis: possibleSolution=2 (conditional-deferred); accreditationDecision=2. EG set level B for all criteria with no substantive deficiencies, but the GER/NAQA decision was conditional-deferred. Issues include: ОК1 duplicating bachelor-level content, missing practical sessions in several methodology OKs, absence of student publications, insufficient practitioner involvement.
key_finding: This programme combines Mathematics (primary subject) and Computer Science (informatics as methodology rather than a fully independent subject specialisation), so the dual-subject balance question in the primary/additional sense does not arise in the same form. No accreditation remarks addressed distribution of credits or lesson-counts between mathematics and informatics as competing subject domains.
